headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains an “Equal Weight” Rating on Applied Materials, Inc. (AMAT)
summary: Applied Materials, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMAT) is one of the 15 Best AI Stocks to Buy and Hold for the Next 5 Years. On July 6, Morgan Stanley bumped up its price target on Applied Materials, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMAT) to $647 from $502. The firm maintained an “Equal Weight” rating on the shares. On June 16, Reuters reported […]

headline: Applied Materials (AMAT) Lands 10 Year TSMC AI Packaging Partnership
summary: Applied Materials (NasdaqGS:AMAT) has entered a new 10 year partnership with Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company focused on advanced AI chip packaging. The agreement is tied to AI driven infrastructure investment and shifting industry cash flows toward chip equipment suppliers. The deal underscores long term demand visibility for Applied Materials’ tools within TSMC’s AI related production plans. Applied Materials sits at the center of the semiconductor equipment industry, supplying...

headline: Korean Chip Stocks Are Trading Like The AI Bubble Has Burst. Is Micron Next?

headline: Trump Reinstates the Iran Blockade and Demands a 20% Toll as America Becomes Hormuz’s “Guardian”
summary: Trump just claimed the right to charge every ship on Earth a 20% toll to pass through one of the world's most critical waterways, and oil markets are already reacting to what that could mean for energy prices, global trade, and U.S. alliances.
